common.ready_cta_description: The most important journey begins with a conversation. Contact us to learn more about our retreats and how we can accompany you.

home.hero_title_start: Retreats & School Where the Master is
home.hero_description: We facilitate personal growth experiences through ancestral wisdom in a safe and sacred environment in Mexico.
home.accompaniment_title: We accompany you in your process
home.accompaniment_description: We connect people with their essential feeling of innocence, their dignity and sense of inherent worth and value.
home.wellbeing_description: Reconnect with your inner peace, mental clarity, and emotional balance during times of change.
home.relationships_description: Strengthen bonds, resolve family conflicts, and find authentic connections.
home.transformation_description: Release habits and patterns that no longer serve you to live with greater fulfillment.
home.experiences_description: We offer different forms of accompaniment based on your moment and need.
home.encounters_description: 3-night retreats with ancestral practices and traditional ceremonies in a safe and sacred environment in Morelos, Mexico.
home.wisdom_description: We work with traditional practices and ancestral ceremonies with an integrative approach, respecting their wisdom without dogmatism.
home.documentary_description: See how our experiences are impacting lives through this documentary.
home.faq_subtitle: We answer your most common questions about our experiences and accompaniment.
home.faq_1_q: Is it safe to participate in a retreat?
home.faq_1_a: Yes, our retreats are completely safe. We have a certified professional team, conduct prior evaluation, and maintain a controlled and sacred environment. The physical and emotional safety of participants is our absolute priority.
home.faq_2_q: How long does a retreat last?
home.faq_2_a: Our main retreats are 3 nights and 4 days. This time allows for a deep immersion in the personal growth process, integrating ceremonies, therapeutic workshops, moments of reflection, and personalized accompaniment.
home.faq_3_q: Do I need previous experience with ancestral practices?
home.faq_3_a: No previous experience is needed. We welcome both people who have never had contact with ancestral practices and those with experience. Each participant receives personalized accompaniment based on their situation.
home.faq_4_q: How do I prepare for a retreat?
home.faq_4_a: Once your participation is confirmed, we send you a complete preparation guide that includes dietary, emotional, and practical recommendations. We also schedule an orientation call to answer all your questions.
home.faq_5_a: Our retreats are held in a beautiful space in Morelos, Mexico. The location is specially designed to create an environment of connection with nature, safe and conducive to introspection and wellbeing.

encounters.hero_description: Our retreats are an opportunity to connect with our inner being, with nature, and with Love.
encounters.upcoming_description: Reserve your spot at our next wellness retreat in Morelos, Mexico.
encounters.questions_help: Have questions? Contact us for more information about the retreat.
encounters.what_is_p1: Our retreats are 3-night experiences where we work with traditional practices and ceremonies in a safe, sacred, and loving environment.
encounters.what_is_p2: Each retreat is designed to facilitate experiences of consciousness expansion, heart opening, and holistic wellbeing, guided by facilitators with over a decade of experience.
encounters.location_description: Our retreats take place in a sacred space surrounded by nature in the state of Morelos, a short distance from Mexico City.
encounters.location_access_desc: 1.5 hours from Mexico City, with transport options from the airport.
encounters.location_intimate_desc: Maximum 15 participants to ensure personalized attention.
encounters.location_nights_desc: Complete experience with preparation, ceremonies, and integration.
encounters.venue_description: A space designed for your process, surrounded by nature and with all amenities.
encounters.included_description: A complete experience with everything you need for your wellbeing.
encounters.process_description: From first contact to integration, we accompany you every step of the way.
encounters.process_1_desc: Schedule a call to get to know us and answer your questions. We assess if the retreat is right for you.
encounters.process_2_desc: You'll receive dietary guidelines, meditations, and reading material to prepare for your experience.
encounters.process_3_desc: 3 nights of immersion with ceremonies, integration, and continuous support from our team.
encounters.process_4_desc: Post-retreat follow-up with integration sessions and access to our support community.
encounters.faq_subtitle: The most common questions from our participants
encounters.faq_1_q: How do I know if I'm ready for a retreat?
encounters.faq_1_a: Feeling curiosity or a calling is a good sign. During the initial call, we evaluate together if it's the right time for you, considering your emotional, physical situation, and any contraindications.
encounters.faq_2_q: What should I bring to the retreat?
encounters.faq_2_a: Comfortable clothing, personal hygiene items, a journal for reflections, and an open mind. We'll send you a detailed list after confirming your attendance.
encounters.faq_3_q: Can I attend alone or do I need to come with someone?
encounters.faq_3_a: You can attend alone — most participants arrive that way. The group becomes a space of mutual support throughout the entire process.
encounters.faq_4_q: What if I feel fear or anxiety before the retreat?
encounters.faq_4_a: It's completely normal to feel nervous. We accompany you in the prior preparation and throughout the entire process with professionalism and love.
encounters.cta_description: The most important journey begins with a conversation. Schedule a no-obligation call to learn more about our retreats.
encounters.detail_venue_subtitle: A space designed for your process, surrounded by nature and with all amenities.
encounters.detail_journey_subtitle: Four days designed to reconnect with your essence
encounters.detail_reserve_desc: Learn about investment options and secure your spot at this transformative retreat.
encounters.detail_contraindications_desc: For your safety, please review these conditions before applying. If in doubt, contact us.
encounters.detail_ready_desc: Take the first step toward a more conscious and fulfilled version of yourself.

practices.hero_description: Traditional ceremonies that facilitate connection with our authentic being and holistic wellbeing.
practices.philosophy_quote: Our approach is integrative and respectful. We honor traditional practices as catalysts of consciousness, but we don't worship them or consider them a panacea.
practices.philosophy_p1: Ancestral practices are catalysts of consciousness, not ends in themselves. The real work happens in integration: the compassionate dialogue that facilitates liberating understandings.
practices.philosophy_p2: Integration is fundamental, where we process and make sense of lived experiences to generate lasting changes in our lives.
practices.safety_desc: Prior evaluation, clear contraindications, controlled environment, and team prepared for any situation.
practices.respect_desc: We honor traditional wisdom without turning it into religion. You are the protagonist, not the practice.
practices.integration_desc: The work doesn't end at the ceremony. Integration is where learnings and changes are consolidated.
practices.practices_description: We work with diverse ceremonies and traditional practices, each with its specific purpose and application.
practices.notice_text: Working with ancestral practices requires preparation, prior evaluation, and professional accompaniment. We do not recommend their practice outside of guided ceremonial contexts. There are important contraindications that we evaluate case by case before each retreat.
practices.cta_description: It's normal to have questions. Schedule a call to talk about your specific situation and resolve all your concerns.

contact.hero_description: Every process is unique. Let's talk about yours.
contact.whatsapp_description: The most direct way to connect. Tell us what you're looking for and we'll guide you with no obligation.
contact.space_description: A nature-surrounded sanctuary where we host 3-night retreats.
contact.faq_description: The most common questions about our retreats and process.
contact.faq_1_q: How do I know if I'm ready for a retreat?
contact.faq_1_a: Schedule a no-obligation call. We'll talk about your situation, expectations, and answer all your questions to determine together if it's the right time.
contact.faq_2_a: Safety is our priority. We conduct prior evaluation, have established protocols, and facilitators with over 10 years of experience.
contact.faq_3_q: What does the retreat cost include?
contact.faq_3_a: Accommodation, meals, ceremonies, integration sessions, facilitator accompaniment, and post-retreat follow-up.
contact.faq_4_q: How long does the retreat last?
contact.faq_4_a: Retreats are 3 nights (Thursday to Sunday), though we also offer longer options for training programs.
contact.call_cta_description: We can schedule a phone conversation if that's more comfortable for you. Message us on WhatsApp and we'll coordinate.

blog.hero_description: Articles on wellbeing, meditation, ancestral practices, and personal transformation.
blog.coming_soon_description: We're preparing articles on wellbeing, meditation, spiritual retreats, and personal transformation. Come back soon.
blog.cta_description: Articles inspire, but transformation happens in the experience. Discover our upcoming retreats.
